---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product improvement with a clear operator benefit
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What operator workflow is blocked, slow, or hard to trust today?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the expected behavior.

## Safety Considerations

Note any impact on reversibility, manifest integrity, preview accuracy, or verification.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or lower-risk options you already considered.
